common.tagline: Smart eFootball coach and tactical counter guides for everyone
common.proModeDesc: These statistical views are for advanced configuration only, and are not strictly needed for everyday game setup.

home.title: Welcome, Coach, to EF26 TACTICS
home.desc: Your secret toolkit for eFootball victory! We have designed a lightweight companion powered by tactical wisdom to help you analyze matches and defeat opponent meta setups. Choose a tool from the menu to start.
home.ctaAnalyze: Expose gaps from your last loss
home.ctaCounter: Find a custom antidote for your opponent
features: Built strictly on real, official eFootball configuration concepts.
Fast, lightweight, mobile-friendly interface designed for rapid use during active match rest cycles.
Custom anti-meta defensive advice formulated by top-tier community players.

auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.guestModeDesc: Your matches, custom profiles, and coordinates are stored securely inside your local browser. If you clear cache, your data will be reset. We recommend performing regular backup exports!
auth.errorMinPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters long
auth.successResetSent: Reset link sent to your email successfully!
auth.errorAuth: Authentication failed. Please verify your email and password credentials.

plan.title: Build Your Tactical Blueprint
plan.subtitle: Answer 3 quick decisions and the coach will instantly recommend your optimal preset formation.
plan.step2: Step 2: What is Your Main Problem?
plan.step3: Step 3: What is Your Experience Level?
plan.limitNote: The official game limit is up to 2 Attacking and 2 Defensive instructions combined.

match.title: Analyze Your Last Match
match.desc: Specify your lineup, the score, and key matchups so your coach can diagnose exactly how to adapt for your next game.
match.problemLabel: Your Main Challenge in the Match
match.notesPlaceholder: E.g., Opponent had high physical defense, heavy wing spamting, slow reaction times...
match.awaitingDesc: Input your lineup parameters and issues above to receive tailored, non-simulated tactical remedies.

counter.title: Counter Opponent Meta
counter.desc: Select your opponent's lineup and playstyle to formulate an official meta neutralization strategy.
counter.oppBaseDesc: E.g., 4-2-2-2 is highly popular in online divisions.
counter.oppPlaystyleDesc: E.g., Quick Counter style used with high-pressing managers.
counter.bestRoles: Best Player Roles for This Matchup

coach.title: AI Smart Coach
coach.desc: Ask your smart coach specific tactical queries, or tap a suggested preselected question chip for advice.
coach.questionPlaceholder: How do I play with 3 CBs? How do I stop deep wing runs?

presets.oppPressing: How to escape heavy high presses?

coach.awaiting: Type your custom query or tap a preselected chip to receive immediate professional tactical advice.

saved.title: Tactical Library & Saved Plans
saved.desc: Retrieve all custom-built line sheets and coach prescriptions saved during active sessions.
saved.emptyDesc: Generate tactical layouts in 'Build Your Plan' or 'Analyze Match' and save them to find them here.
saved.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this saved plan from your record log?

settings.title: Settings & Core Configurations
settings.desc: Adjust interface translation, accent theme variables, database exports, and update security parameters.
settings.backupDesc: Download or upload your tactical index configuration on standard format files to move them safely between browsers.
settings.wipeConfirm: CRITICAL warning: This action will permanently erase your local profiles, saved configurations, and custom coordinates are irreversible. Proceed?
settings.errorPasswordMatch: Your new password and confirmation do not match.
settings.errorEmptyFields: Please fill in all requested fields.
settings.errorMinLen: Your new password must be at least 8 characters long.
settings.cloudSyncDesc: Your custom team plans and coordinates are automatically securely backed up to your account database in the background.
settings.proThemesDesc: Select a custom theme styling that is easy on your eyes
